preconditions: user_function must not have keyword-only arguments without default values
postconditions: returns a callable with the same behavior as user_function
subsequent calls with the same arguments will return the cached result
edge_cases: if user_function has side effects, they will only occur on the first call
if user_function raises an exception, it will not be cached
cache will grow without bound as more unique arguments are passed to user_function

postconditions: cache returns a callable that wraps user_function
cache returns a callable that caches results of user_function
edge_cases: cache raises TypeError if user_function is not a callable
cache raises TypeError if user_function is None

groq_only: user_function must not have keyword-only arguments without default values
returns a callable with the same behavior as user_function
subsequent calls with the same arguments will return the cached result
hf_only: cache returns a callable that wraps user_function
cache returns a callable that caches results of user_function

agreed.groq: if user_function raises an exception, it will not be cached
agreed.hf: cache raises TypeError if user_function is None

groq_only: if user_function has side effects, they will only occur on the first call
cache will grow without bound as more unique arguments are passed to user_function
hf_only: cache raises TypeError if user_function is not a callable
